title: Rebecca Is Born Into Hope
description: Pages 16–20 focus on rebecca is born into hope, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trebol, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Doflamingo as kyros's life as Dressrosa's legendary fighter and his bond with King Riku, Scarlet, and Rebecca reveal the human heart behind the toy soldier.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't want to be a toy for the rest of my life!! If you bring me back, I'll never go after straw hat again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'll become your servant or whatever you like!! Win this for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You want money?! I'll give you a fortune!! Just do this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Trebol
dialogue.text: Trebol!! Hurry and bring sugar to the palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Beheheh!! Don't you worry, Dofy! There ain't gonna be...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You can rest easy, young master!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You can have this poisoned grape back, too.

dialogue.speaker: Sugar
dialogue.text: Hey?! Sugar, what are you doing?! Keep a hold of yourself!!!

summary: Rebecca Is Born Into Hope develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Luffy, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Trebol, Unknown person #3, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
